title: Java Ternary Operator
summary: The Java Ternary Operator provides a simplified if-statement construct. The Java Ternary Operator tutorial has been updated to show how to chain more than one ternary operator into a single expression.
content: The Java Ternary Operator provides a simplified if-statement construct. The Java Ternary Operator tutorial has been updated to show how to chain more than one ternary operator into a single expression.
